message:
fix(install): refuse to create HQ inside existing workspace

Previously 'gt install' would only warn when run inside an existing Gas Town
workspace (like a crew worktree), then proceed to create nested HQ files
that corrupted the directory.

Now it errors with a clear message explaining:
- The current location
- The existing town root
- How to update the binary instead (make install)
- How to force if really needed (--force)

Fixes bd-co92

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
